hook: I was training to be a counsellor when I found out something that shocked me.
vo: On the big platforms a client can pay seventy to a hundred dollars a week, while the therapist doing the work might see around a third of it.
The platform pockets the rest. For providing a platform.
So I built something else. No commission on sessions. Free to start. You set your own prices and keep what you charge.
The only per-session cost is standard card processing — and Faresay keeps none of it.
cta: I built the thing I want to use myself. If you're a therapist, come have a look.
broll_notes: Close-up of a phone screen showing a clean scheduling interface; cut to hands typing a price into a form field; cut to a bank transfer notification on screen. No presenter shown.
